name: Endeavor: Rite of Passage
short_description: Take command of powerful armies with intuitive player controls and classic RTS features and feel. Control powerful super-weapons and elite units through a 21-mission campaign. Continue the fight on 16 skirmish and 8 unique survival maps.
detailed_description:
Take command of powerful armies with intuitive player controls and classic RTS features and feel.

Play through a 21-mission campaign and continue the fight on 16 unique skirmish and 8 unique survival maps. 

Play as...

Endeavor: A well-equipped traditionally balanced resistance force.

Praesidium: Elite private security specializing in defense of valuable assets.

Yari: An invading alien army.

Build and defend your base. Construct powerful units, research new technology and enhance your weaponry. Discover hidden technologies and control experimental weapons. Deploy tactical strikes and support your army with battlefield abilities.

Endeavor is an evolving passion project. Features and content will be added over time. 

Thanks for playing!

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Hindi, Simplified Chinese, Italian, Portuguese - Brazil
*languages with full audio support
